description_long: This is a rectangular ceramic plate featuring a serving of sashimi, likely tuna, arranged in thick slices atop a bed of finely shredded white radish and garnished with green onions and a dollop of wasabi. The plate has a slightly raised rim and a glazed, earthy brown and cream finish, giving it a rustic, artisanal appearance. The sashimi is a vibrant red, contrasting with the pale, almost translucent radish and the bright green and yellow garnishes. The food is artfully presented, with the fish slices fanned out and the garnishes neatly placed to one side. The plate itself appears sturdy and well-crafted, suitable for serving high-quality Japanese cuisine. No visible markings or inscriptions are present on the plate.
description: A rustic rectangular ceramic plate with sashimi, shredded radish, and colorful garnishes, arranged artfully for serving. The plate has an earthy brown and cream glaze and a slightly raised rim.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sashimi slices prominently displayed on the plate, with garnishes and shredded radish clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the shredded radish mound and the arrangement of garnishes, with the sashimi partially obscured.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the wasabi and green onion garnish, with the sashimi slices seen from the side.
description_view_3: Rear view shows the back of the sashimi slices and the plate's rim, with less detail of the garnishes.
